tasks.label: run with input/output file
tasks.command: g++ -std=c++17 -Wall -Wextra -g3 "${file}" -o "${fileDirname}\${fileBasenameNoExtension}.exe"; if ($?) { Get-Content "${fileDirname}\input.txt" | & "${fileDirname}\${fileBasenameNoExtension}.exe" | Out-File "${fileDirname}\output.txt"; Write-Host '✅ Output saved to output.txt'; Read-Host 'Press Enter to exit' }
